description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The ID for the employee or contingent worker. Workday.Worker.User_ID Text attribute identifying User Name.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Worker_ID

outputs.description: The worker Country. Workday.Worker.Legal_First_Name The First Name (Given Name) for a worker.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Country

outputs.description: The Last Name (Family Name) for a worker. Workday.Worker.Preferred_First_Name The First Name (Preferred Name) for a worker.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Legal_Last_Name

outputs.description: The Last Name (Preferred Name) for a worker. Workday.Worker.Position_ID Text attribute identifying Position ID.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Preferred_Last_Name

outputs.description: Text attribute identifying Position Title. Workday.Worker.Business_Title Business title for the position.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Position_Title

outputs.description: Date the Worker first started work in this Position. Workday.Worker.End_Employment_Reason_Reference Termination/End Additional Job Reason.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Start_Date

outputs.description: The worker type for the position. Workday.Worker.Position_Time_Type Position time type.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Worker_Type

outputs.description: Scheduled Weekly Hours for Position. Workday.Worker.Default_Weekly_Hours Standard Weekly Hours for Position.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Scheduled_Weekly_Hours

outputs.description: Full Time Equivalent Percentage for Position. Workday.Worker.Exclude_from_Headcount If Y, the position will be excluded from headcount reporting.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Full_Time_Equivalent_Percentage

outputs.description: Pay rate type for the position. Workday.Worker.Job_Profile_Name The name of the job profile.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Pay_Rate_Type

outputs.description: Returns true if a work shift is required on the position where this job profile is used. Workday.Worker.Critical_Job Returns true if the job profile is considered a critical job.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Work_Shift_Required

outputs.description: Business Site ID. Workday.Worker.Business_Site_Name The name of the location.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Business_Site_id

outputs.description: The type of a location. Workday.Worker.Business_Site_Address.Address_ID Business site address ID.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Business_Site_Type

outputs.description: The formatted address in the format specified for the country. Workday.Worker.Business_Site_Address.Country Country for the address.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Business_Site_Address.Formatted_Address

outputs.description: The postal code part of the address. Workday.Worker.End_Date The effective date of the end employment business process.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Business_Site_Address.Postal_Code

outputs.description: The pay through date for the end of employment. Workday.Worker.Active Boolean attribute identifying whether the Worker is Active.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Pay_Through_Date

outputs.description: The most recent hire date for the employee or contract start date for the contingent worker. Workday.Worker.Hire_Reason Reason for Hire from the most recent Hire event.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Hire_Date

outputs.description: First Day of Work only applies to the Payroll web service. Workday.Worker.Retired Boolean attribute identifying whether the Worker is currently retired.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.First_Day_of_Work

outputs.description: Number of days unemployed since the employee first joined the work force. Used only for China. Workday.Worker.Terminated Boolean attribute identifying whether the Worker is currently Terminated.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Days_Unemployed

outputs.description: Most recent Termination Date. Workday.Worker.Primary_Termination_Reason The primary reason for the worker's most recent termination.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Termination_Date

outputs.description: Reference to primary termination reason category. Workday.Worker.Termination_Involuntary Indicates if the termination was involuntary.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Primary_Termination_Category

outputs.description: Returns "Yes" if the worker is a rehire based on the most recent hire event. Workday.Worker.Termination_Last_Day_of_Work Last day worked for the worker's termination event.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Rehire

outputs.description: Date the employee submitted their resignation. Workday.Worker.Has_International_Assignment Indicates whether the worker has internaitonal assignment
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Resignation_Date

outputs.description: Contains the home country for worker's primary job (ISO_3166-1_Alpha-2_Code). Workday.Worker.Photo Worker's photo in base64.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Home_Country_Reference

outputs.description: Worker's address ID. Workday.Worker.Addresses.Formatted_Address the formatted address in the format specified for the country.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Addresses.Address_ID

outputs.description: Country for the Worker's address. Workday.Worker.Addresses.Region The ID of the region (ISO_3166-2_Code)
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Addresses.Country

outputs.description: The region part of the address. Typically this contains the state/province information. Workday.Worker.Addresses.Postal_Code The postal code part of the address.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Addresses.Region_Descriptor

outputs.description: Address type. Workday.Worker.Emails.Email_Address Email Address Information.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Addresses.Type

outputs.description: Usage type. Workday.Worker.Emails.Primary Indicates if the communication method is primary.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Emails.Type

outputs.description: Indicates if the Email is public. Workday.Worker.Phones.ID Phone ID.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Emails.Public

outputs.description: Phone number. Workday.Worker.Phones.Type Phone Device Type.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Phones.Phone_Number

outputs.description: Phone usage data. Workday.Worker.Manager.Manager_ID The manager worker ID.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Phones.Usage

outputs.description: The manager name.
outputs.name: Workday.Worker.Manager.Manager_Name
